org.apache.dubbo.remoting

接口 Client

  • 所有超级接口:
    Channel, Endpoint, IdleSensible, Resetable
    所有已知子接口:
    ExchangeClient
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractClient, ClientDelegate, GrizzlyClient, HeaderExchangeClient, MinaClient, NettyClient, NettyClient

    public interface Client
extends Endpoint, Channel, Resetable, IdleSensible
    Remoting Client. (API/SPI, Prototype, ThreadSafe)

    Client/Server

    另请参阅:
    Transporter.connect(org.apache.dubbo.common.URL, ChannelHandler)

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 已过时的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void reconnect()
      reconnect.
      void reset(Parameters parameters)
      已过时。 

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Channel

        getAttribute, getRemoteAddress, hasAttribute, isConnected, removeAttribute, setAttribute

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Endpoint

        close, close, getChannelHandler, getLocalAddress, getUrl, isClosed, send, send, startClose

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.common.Resetable

        reset

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.IdleSensible

        canHandleIdle
